author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — requires unrestricted access to src/subagent.rs (FORBIDDEN under current cleanup scope).

**Fix outline:** Replace the three error-swallowing patterns in WorktreeIsolation (create/has_changes/cleanup) with typed errors: (a) reject non-UTF-8 worktree paths up front with a typed WorktreeError variant rather than passing an empty string to git; (b) propagate git command failure from has_changes as a Result rather than collapsing to 'no changes'; (c) log+propagate cleanup branch-delete failures instead of discarding them. The fix is local (~50 lines in WorktreeIsolation impl block, src/subagent.rs:454-530).

**Blocking:** src/subagent.rs is reserved scope under the multi-agent collision policy. Defer to a future unrestricted pass.
